'''lasava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:grabby|grabby]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grabby|grabby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lasava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læsævæth|læsævæth]] || [[word:læsævæj|læsævæj]] || [[word:læsævæsh|læsævæsh]] || [[word:læsævæ|læsævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasasavath|lasasavath]] || [[word:lasasavaj|lasasavaj]] || [[word:lasasavash|lasasavash]] || [[word:lasasava|lasasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasavath|lasavath]] || [[word:lasavaj|lasavaj]] || [[word:lasavash|lasavash]] || [[word:lasava|lasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasafvath|lasafvath]] || [[word:lasafvaj|lasafvaj]] || [[word:lasafvash|lasafvash]] || [[word:lasafvaf|lasafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lasavatha|lasavatha]] || [[word:lasavaja|lasavaja]] || [[word:lasavasha|lasavasha]] || [[word:lasavaka|lasavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lasavath|lasavath]] || [[word:lasavaj|lasavaj]] || [[word:lasavash|lasavash]] || [[word:lasava|lasava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lasavathal|lasavathal]] || [[word:lasavajal|lasavajal]] || [[word:lasavashal|lasavashal]] || [[word:lasavakal|lasavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lasavathatha|lasavathatha]] || [[word:lasavajaja|lasavajaja]] || [[word:lasavashasha|lasavashasha]] || [[word:lasavaka|lasavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lasavathan|lasavathan]] || [[word:lasavajan|lasavajan]] || [[word:lasavashan|lasavashan]] || [[word:lasavakan|lasavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lasavathaoro|lasavathaoro]] || [[word:lasavajaoro|lasavajaoro]] || [[word:lasavashaoro|lasavashaoro]] || [[word:lasavakaoro|lasavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
